Wade buys a sandwich to eat now, one for the road, and one for in the evening. He also buys 2 drinks. The drinks cost $4 each, so the total cost for drinks is [drink_cost] * 2 = [total_drink_cost]. Wade spends a total of $26, so the cost of the sandwiches is [total_spent] - [total_drink_cost] = [sandwich_cost]. Since he buys 3 sandwiches, the cost per sandwich is [sandwich_cost] / 3 = [price_per_sandwich]. Lab is an important part of any scientific experiment, and it helps in understanding the results of the experiment.
